means.mean: làm nhẹ bớt, làm giảm bớt (nỗi đau, sự khó khăn)
means.example: The new government program is designed to alleviate poverty in rural areas.

means.mean: mơ hồ, nhập nhằng, có nhiều hơn một nghĩa
means.example: His message was ambiguous, making it difficult to understand his true intentions.
She finished the race in first place for three consecutive years.
The Prime Minister met with his British counterpart to discuss trade relations.
The patient's condition deteriorated rapidly overnight.

means.mean: khơi gợi, gợi ra (phản ứng, thông tin)
means.example: The questionnaire was intended to elicit information on eating habits.

means.mean: khả thi, có thể thực hiện được
means.example: With the current budget, it is not feasible to build a new hospital.

means.mean: không thể tránh khỏi, tất yếu
means.example: The split between the two political parties was inevitable.
These diseases are more prevalent among young children.

means.mean: chưa từng có, chưa từng xảy ra
means.example: The company has enjoyed unprecedented success this year.
